items.title: Cartrack
items.description:
As a global company, we offer data analytic solutions for mobile asset management, asset recovery and workforce optimisation. Our industry-leading service is based on a proven Software-as-a-Service platform that is updated regularly and being used by customers worldwide.
We innovate and strive for perfection when it comes to our product and our client base, from small to large businesses and a wide range of customers.

items.title: iRainbow
items.description: iRainbow is a leading eLearning platform in South Africa, crafted by expert educators to help children ace maths, with additional subjects to be added. As a top e-learning service, we offer the best maths software for offline use, ensuring every child can learn without internet access. Dive into innovative e-learning solutions with iRainbow, your trusted companion in offline educational software.

items.title: Powerfleet Africa
items.description: On April 2, 2024, MiX Telematics Limited officially combined with Powerfleet Inc. (Nasdaq: AIOT; JSE: PWR; TASE: PWFL), creating a global leader in AIoT (Artificial Intelligence of Things) software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions for the mobile asset industry. With more than 30 years of experience, Powerfleet unifies business operations by ingesting, harmonizing, and integrating data from virtually any source, delivering actionable insights to help companies save lives, time, and money. Powerfleet’s ethos extends beyond our data ecosystem and commitment to innovation; our people-centric approach empowers our customers to achieve impactful and sustained business improvements.

items.title: Tarsus Distribution
items.description:
Tarsus Distribution expertly handles and distributes the world’s most prominent IT brands to the Southern African reseller and retail channels supported by professional solutions in supply chain optimisation and unmatched support.

Beyond the traditional hardware offering, the enterprise computing and security space is where Tarsus Distribution journeys with partner-resellers to provide expert technical know-how, in order to help them design and deliver enterprise technology solutions including storage, networking servers as well as leading security brands.
Through their digital capabilities they enable partner-resellers to deliver enhanced end-customer experiences.

items.description:
Sage is the global market leader for technology that helps small and medium businesses perform at their best. Sage is trusted by millions of customers worldwide to deliver the best cloud technology and support, with our partners, to manage finances, operations, and people. We believe in doing everything we can to help people be the best they can be, so the combined efforts of 13,000 Sage colleagues working with businesses and communities make a real difference to the world.
Sage. Perform at your Best.

items.title: Axiz
items.description: Axiz is a leading digital technologies and services distributor that provides technology intelligence to its business partners through the supply of world-class products and a host of new and exciting in-house services. The comprehensive product and services portfolio, combined with a continent wide footprint and value-based distribution model enables Axiz to drive new and advanced technologies to the market. The strategic thrust of the company is seen in its ability to build commercial and technological ecosystems that allow its partner base to architect and provide best-of-breed solutions which address the business requirements of their customers.

items.title: BBD - Johannesburg
items.description: A leading custom software solutions company, BBD provides turnkey digital enablement, software engineering and solution support services to scale-up and large corporations around the world. Tech agnostic, BBD has successfully delivered solutions into the financial services, insurance, telecoms, education, retail and public sectors for the last 40 years. Our global team of 1200+ skilled professionals work in an agile, productive teams to ensure clients see true value in every solution. With extensive technical expertise, BBD is committed to delivering innovative, high-quality results. Contact us today to discover how we can help drive your business forward.

items.title: Daisy Business Solutions
items.description: ​​Daisy Business solutions is a company that has vast expertise in Office Automation, Business Environment Infrastructure and Business Technology. Our primary core capabilities are geared towards the sale and servicing of Information Communication Technology (ICT), Office Automation (OA), Optimised Energy Infrastructure (OEI) & Business Security Technologies (BST) With wholly owned finance, service and support infrastructure, we are able to provide customers with complete 360” turn key office solutions. For 35 years we have built a business network that today forms the backbone of our national operation.
